_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Yogera mukwano, olinge okuyingira.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan yazimbwa okuba evunaamu eri olulimi lulilwona. Olulimi oluwona olufunzibwa olulina musawo ogumu gwa kukyusa.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Erinnya ery'olulimi ne Marks enkalu ya akabanga. Marks bwe byuma bya kuyingira, si bisina.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Kyusa Liana Banyan mu {{language}}. Wa {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.scopeWelcome: Ebizika bya Musuze / Ensi ya Mizimu
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Ekimu kyonna wano kisubizibwako erinnya olw'empaka. Ensibuko y'amannya 26 agatenderezebwa.
speakFriend.step1Body: Fungula Omusawo gwa Kukyusa okuva Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Kyusa ebimu byonna ebyetaagibwa. Wonawo Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Oluvannyuma lw'okuwaakana, ofuna Marks n'okukyusibwako ku IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Gamba mukwano, ojje."

languageSwitcher.tip: Kozesa ebigambo by'olulimi obukyufu ku Mulyango gwa Durin okusobola okufungula ebirungi bisooka!
